name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property (sculpture), a standing wooden statue of Amida Nyorai. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2019-03-27.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a hanging lantern. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1962-04-09.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1963-02-26. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a palanquin. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1964-04-03.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a set of furnishings and writing implements. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1964-04-03.

name_romaji: Hirazukuri Tantō Mei Satake Minamoto Yoshitomi Saku
name_en: Flat-Style Short Sword, Signed Satake Minamoto Yoshitomi
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a flat-style short sword bearing the signature of Satake Minamoto Yoshitomi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1967-03-30.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a sutra desk. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31.

A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of black-lacquered armor laced with dark-blue cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Hitoiro Kawazutsumi Butsudō Kuroito Odoshi Gusoku
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with a leather-wrapped Buddha-style cuirass laced with black cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a firearm with gold inlay and an inscribed poem. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1970-03-31. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Kijibori no Kura Ginzōgan Hanabishi Uchi Tetsu Kikusui no Abumi
name_en: Wood-Carved Saddle and Iron Chrysanthemum-Water Stirrups with Silver Inlay
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a wood-carved saddle with silver flower-diamond inlay and iron stirrups with a chrysanthemum-and-water motif. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_en: Saddle and Stirrups with Mother-of-Pearl Monkey Maki-e
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a saddle and stirrups decorated with mother-of-pearl and monkey maki-e lacquer. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Kuronuri Sōka Kanamono-tsuki Kura Kuronuri Muji Kataemi Abumi
name_en: Black-Lacquered Saddle with Floral Fittings and Plain Black Stirrups
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a black-lacquered saddle with floral metal fittings and plain black-lacquered stirrups. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

A tangible cultural property (craft), a black-lacquered saddle with frolicking-colt maki-e lacquer decoration. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-03-17. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a blue-and-white ceramic tea brazier attributed to Dosan. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1972-01-05.

name_romaji: Murasakiito Sugake Odoshi Kuro Rasha-zutsumi Nimai Dō Gusoku
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with a black-wool-covered two-piece cuirass laced with purple cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1991-07-18. Held (on deposit) at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Honkozane Konito Odoshi Nimai Dō Gusoku
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of true-scale armor with a two-piece cuirass laced with dark-blue cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1991-07-18. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Murasakiito Sugake Odoshi Gomai Dō Gusoku
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with a five-piece cuirass laced with purple cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1994-03-04.

name_romaji: Iyozane Kurokawa Sugake Odoshi Nimai Dō Gusoku
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with Iyo-style scales and a two-piece cuirass laced with black leather. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1995-02-27.
A tangible cultural property (craft), a stone shrine pavilion. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2003-03-18.

name_romaji: Kuro Urushinuri Honkozane Moegi Ito Odoshi Katajiro Dōmaru Gusoku
name_en: Black-Lacquered True-Scale Light-Green-Laced White-Shouldered Domaru Armor
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of black-lacquered true-scale domaru armor laced with light-green cords and white shoulder sections. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2011-03-03.

name_romaji: Okegawa Maru Ryūmon Makie Konito Odoshi Nimai Dō Gusoku
name_en: Barrel-Sided Round-Dragon Maki-e Dark-Blue-Laced Two-Piece Cuirass Armor
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with a barrel-sided cuirass bearing round-dragon maki-e and a two-piece cuirass laced with dark-blue cords. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2019-03-27. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Tetsuji Kawazutsumi Sabiiro Urushinuri Sanmai Hotoke Dō Gusoku
name_en: Iron-Ground Leather-Wrapped Rust-Lacquered Three-Piece Buddha-Cuirass Armor
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a suit of armor with an iron ground, leather wrapping, rust-colored lacquer, and a three-piece Buddha-style cuirass. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2025-03-24. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Kikaraori Botan Karakusa Jimon Dōfuku Jinbaori
description_en: A tangible cultural property (craft), a military surcoat of yellow brocade with a peony-arabesque ground pattern. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2025-03-24. Held at the Satake Historical Materials Museum, Senshu Park.

name_romaji: Ōbaku-shū Ingen Mokuan Sokuhi San-Zenji Hōgo
name_en: Dharma Words of the Three Obaku Zen Masters Ingen, Mokuan and Sokuhi
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), Dharma words of the three Obaku-sect Zen masters Ingen, Mokuan and Sokuhi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1964-04-03.

name_en: Lotus Sutra Copied by Satake Yoshizumi
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), a copy of the Lotus Sutra transcribed by Satake Yoshizumi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1964-04-03.
A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), the suigo (pendant words) of Arai. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30.

name_romaji: Ishii Rogetsu Hitsu Kiri Fusuma no Haiku
name_en: Haiku on Paulownia Sliding Doors, by Ishii Rogetsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), haiku brushed on paulownia sliding doors by Ishii Rogetsu. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1971-04-04.

name_en: Lotus Sutra in Gold Ink on Indigo Paper
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), a copy of the Lotus Sutra written in gold ink on indigo paper. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1973-03-14.

name_en: Fragment of the Senzaishu in Ink on Paper, by Shunzei
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), an ink-on-paper fragment of the Senzaishu attributed to Shunzei. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1983-02-23.
A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), autograph draft manuscripts by Ishii Rogetsu. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1991-07-09.

name_en: Correspondence of Ishii Rogetsu with Associates
description_en: A tangible cultural property (calligraphy), letters exchanged between Ishii Rogetsu and his associates. Municipally designated by Akita City on 2004-09-21.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the records of Kubota Town. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1965-04-12.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the records of Yonezawa Town. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30. Held at the Akita Prefectural Archives, Sanno Shinmachi.

name_en: Village Headman's Diary of Ushijima Village
description_en: A tangible cultural property (old document), the headman's diary of Ushijima Village. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30. Located at Sanno 1-chome.
A tangible cultural property (old document), an old map of Minato Town. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30. Located at Sanno 1-chome.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the town-representative diary of Omachi 3-chome. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the documents of Kajimachi. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1966-03-30. Held at the Meitokukan Central Library, Senshu Meitokumachi.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the village-headman documents of Araya. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1979-10-09. Held at the Meitokukan Central Library, Senshu Meitokumachi.
A tangible cultural property (old document), the documents of the Sugano family. Municipally designated by Akita City on 1988-09-06.
